title.en: When the time comes, take care of each other, a...

content.en:
Ye Tian chatted with his apprentice Han Xuan for a long time, and gradually understood the boundary of Hanhai District.

"Disciple, didn't the Dao Ancestors who walked out from here unite?"

Ye Tian was a little curious, after all, there were many Dao Ancestors who had walked out of here, and many of them had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, if they hadn't fallen, maybe they would have achieved half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestors.

When the time comes, take care of each other, and you will also be a backer!

Han Xuan smiled bitterly: "Master, when you go to the boundary of the Hanhai District, who cares about whom, although everyone is from this area, you may still be an enemy! The boundaries of the Hanhai region are constantly fighting each other. Even if they come from the same community realm, it's normal for each other to be enemies!"

"That's right!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Abruptly, Han Xuan said: "Master, in our area, many Dao Ancestors have fallen, and many of them have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, but there are still some who have grown! For example, the Ancient Dao Ancestor in the primeval realm is now a sevenfold primordial ancestor, and has become an elder of a force, so he can mix it well! But the best one should belong to the Dark Dao Ancestor, he is already a half-step eightfold primordial ancestor. "

"Dark Dao Ancestor, this is the former first Dao Ancestor of the Dark Zone Realm!"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

"Yes!" Han Xuan nodded slightly, "After the Dark Dao Ancestor left this area boundary, the dark area boundary was shattered because of a big battle. However, the Dark Dao Ancestor was not in the Hanhai Realm now, but had gone to the more powerful Realm of the Great Zone. "

Ye Tian nodded slightly, he didn't expect to rely on other Dao Ancestors.

Besides, the other Dao Ancestors didn't know him, they were all strangers!

......

this day.

Ye Tian let one of his duplicate bodies go to the amputated Black Mountain, and this time he didn't notify anyone.

He had several duplicate bodies, so even if he left, it was impossible for other Dao Ancestors to know, and even Han Xuan would think that he hadn't left yet.

Soon after, Ye Tian came to Truncated Black Mountain.

Truncate Montenegro.

Ye Tian stepped into here alone, and if he was another Dao Ancestor, he didn't dare to do this, he was looking for death.

However, with his current strength, he could naturally cross and cut off the Black Mountain alone, and those top half-step sevenfold ancestors could also do it.

It's like Han Xuan's previous life, she did it!

As soon as he entered the Truncated Black Mountain, Ye Tian encountered a lot of primordial antiquities.

He shot directly and killed them one by one.

At his speed, he soon reached the area of the Primordial Ancient Stone.

The dense Primordial Ancient Stones surrounded Ye Tian, even if it was Ye Tian himself, there was no way for one person to kill all these Primordial Ancient Stones, so he could only choose to kill through them.

The Endless Light Shield protects the body, and the Endless Black Domain suppresses these primordial ancient stones.

Then, Ye Tian shuttled quickly at endless speed, and whenever the Primordial Ancient Stone that intercepted him in front of him, he directly killed it with one blow or blasted it away.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to kill through this area.

And these primordial ancient stones did not continue to chase and kill, and directly let Ye Tian leave.

Obviously, these primordial stones will not leave their territory easily.

......

At the boundary of the Hanhai area and the border that cut off the Black Mountain, a figure emerged.

This figure is Ye Tian.

"It's finally out!"

Ye Tian looked around, identified the direction, and shuttled away directly.

There are hundreds of thousands of community boundaries in the Hanhai Realm, each of which is stronger than the Tongtian Origin Boundary, but the most prosperous place is not these Cell Boundaries, but the giant city above the Silent Black Sea.

That's right, on the border of the Hanhai region, powerful forces have built giant cities in the Silent Black Sea, and these giant cities can shield the rules of the Silent Black Sea.

On the giant city of the Silent Black Sea, even if you stay for a long time, you won't attract a lot of primordial antiquities.

Of course, if you leave these megacities, you will encounter primitive antiquities.

And the giant city that Ye Tian is going to this time is called Xinggu Giant City, and the reason why he went to this giant city is because a branch of Xuanyu Pavilion is in this giant city.

He went directly to the Star Ancient Giant City, and he could join the Xuanyu Pavilion.

It's a long way from the Star Ancient Giant City, and if you keep flying, it will take a long time, and you will encounter a lot of primordial artifacts during this time, and if you are unlucky, you may even encounter primordial artifacts comparable to the sevenfold original ancestors.

Therefore, if the cultivator did not reach the Sevenfold Ancestor, he would not dare to stay in the Silent Black Sea for a long time.

Soon, Ye Tian rested in a nearby community, and after a while, he hurried again.

After a while, Ye Tian came to the Xuanhe District boundary.

The Xuanhe District Boundary is similar to a kind of transit area boundary, with a large number of Dao Gates connecting many places.

For example, the Star Ancient Giant City has many Dao Gates connected here, and Ye Tian can enter the Star Gu Giant City directly through the Dao Gates here, and there is no need to rush in the Silent Black Sea.

Of course, there is a little cost to use the Dao Gate here, and for Dao Ancestor, this cost is nothing.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Star Ancient Giant City through the Dao Gate.

......

Xinggu Giant City.

After Ye Tian came here through the Dao Gate, he sensed a large number of Dao Ancestors.

However, he also felt some of the aura of the Fivefold Ancestor.

Although the Fivefold Ancestor could not enter the Silent Black Sea, he could still enter the Star Ancient Giant City and live here through the Dao Gate.

There are a lot of ordinary jobs in the Star Ancient Giant City, and the Dao Ancestors are definitely not willing to do it, but those Fivefold Origin Ancestors are willing to do it, and there are many opportunities here, so many Fivefold Origin Ancestors are willing to come here to try.

The reason why Xinggu Giant City spent so many resources to build a giant city here naturally has a special reason.

In the vicinity of the Star Ancient Giant City, there are many ancient nests, and these ancient nests contain a lot of opportunities, and any ancient nest is no less than the dark ancient nest.

Therefore, many Dao Ancestors wanted to enter these ancient nests to find treasure resources.

And the Xinggu Giant City was built here, which made it convenient for these Dao Ancestors to come and go, and even if they encountered danger, they could escape into the Xinggu Giant City in time.

With the power of the Star Ancient Giant City, even a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor may not be able to break through.

Of course.

There is a cost to living in Xinggu Big City, and accommodation here is very expensive, let alone buying a property.

But even so, there are still many Dao Ancestors who are willing to live here.

Moreover, Xinggu Giant City is not allowed to fight, and it is very safe to live here, many times safer than living in those community boundaries.

Ye Tian paid some fees and obtained a temporary token, which allowed him to live in the Star Ancient Giant City for a period of time.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to the Xuanyu Pavilion branch of the Star Ancient Giant City.
